# DreamDiecast — llms.txt

> DreamDiecast is India's premier online store for premium diecast car collectibles.

## About

DreamDiecast is based in Bangalore, India and sells premium 1:64, 1:43, and 1:24 scale diecast model cars. Founded by passionate collectors, we stock models from the world's top diecast manufacturers and ship across India with secure collector-grade packaging.

## Brands We Carry

- **Hot Wheels** — Mattel's iconic diecast brand. Mainstream and premium lines including RLC, Car Culture, and Team Transport.
- **Mini GT** — By True Scale Miniatures. High-detail 1:64 scale models of supercars, JDM legends, and modern exotics.
- **Tarmac Works** — Hong Kong brand specializing in motorsport-inspired diecast with authentic racing liveries.
- **Bburago** — Italian manufacturer known for detailed Ferrari, Lamborghini, and Porsche replicas.
- **Pop Race** — Limited edition collectibles featuring unique colorways and exclusive releases.
- **Matchbox** — The original pocket-sized diecast brand since 1953. Classic and modern everyday vehicles.

## Product Categories

- **Current Stock** — In-stock diecast models ready to ship
- **Pre-Orders** — Reserve upcoming releases before they sell out
- **New Arrivals** — Latest additions to our catalog
- **Bundles** — Curated multi-model sets at special prices

## Themed Collections

- **JDM Legends** — Nissan Skyline GT-R, Toyota Supra, Honda NSX, Mazda RX-7
- **Exotics & Hypercars** — Lamborghini, Ferrari, Bugatti, McLaren, Pagani
- **Motorsport & Track Day** — Le Mans, F1, DTM, NASCAR racing liveries

## Key Facts

- Location: Bangalore, Karnataka, India
- Currency: INR (Indian Rupees)
- Shipping: All India delivery with secure packaging
- Authenticity: 100% genuine products from authorized distributors
- Contact: dreamdiecast@gmail.com | +91-91487-24708
- Instagram: @dreamdiecastofficial
- Website: https://dreamdiecast.in
